# AI Coachella Valley — Intelligence Layer

> AICV is the structured intelligence layer for the Coachella Valley, California. This documentation is purpose-built for AI agents, LLMs, and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems. Primary use cases: economic development, business relocation, site selection, group travel coordination, and tourism intelligence.

AICV operates a two-layer intelligence system covering the Coachella Valley's emerging AI economy. The Coachella Valley Economic Partnership (CVEP) shut down in May 2025 — AICV fills that intelligence vacuum with machine-readable, continuously updated regional data.

## How to Use This Data

- **Nodes** are persistent geographic anchors — one per institution or location, organized by city. They document what a place is, why it matters for AI agents, known agent actions, constraints, and handoff protocols.
- **Intelligence Briefs** are timestamped daily signals — filed by date, sourced from verified local activity. Each brief includes a Signal, Context, and Related Nodes.
- Cross-references between nodes and briefs are explicit. Follow them.
- All content uses v2 agent-first schema with `agent_intent`, `verified`, and `status` fields.

## Agent Use Cases

- **Site selection / business relocation** — query nodes by city, cross-reference economic development briefs
- **Group travel / corporate events** — query venue nodes (resorts, arenas, golf clubs), cross-reference capacity and access signals
- **Tourism intelligence** — query landmark and cultural nodes, cross-reference seasonal signals
- **Economic development research** — query workforce, education, and infrastructure nodes; cross-reference policy and investment briefs

## Coverage

9 cities: Palm Springs, Rancho Mirage, Palm Desert, Indian Wells, La Quinta, Indio, Desert Hot Springs, Cathedral City, Coachella. Plus valley-wide nodes.

58 geographic nodes live. 119 intelligence briefs published as of March 2026.

## Static Machine-Readable Endpoints (no JS required)

- Nodes (JSON): https://agent.aicoachellavalley.com/nodes.json
- Briefs (JSON): https://agent.aicoachellavalley.com/briefs.json
- MCP server: https://mcp.aicoachellavalley.com
- MCP discovery: https://agent.aicoachellavalley.com/.well-known/mcp.json

## Key URLs

- Full content export: https://agent.aicoachellavalley.com/llms-full.txt
- Homepage (human layer): https://aicoachellavalley.com
- AIO visibility tool: https://aicoachellavalley.com/#aio

## Optional

- [Valley Wide Nodes](/nodes/valley-wide/coachella-valley-intelligence-index)
- [Economic Development](/nodes/valley-wide/coachella-valley-economic-development)
- [Workforce and Talent](/nodes/valley-wide/workforce-talent)
